title: jump reset indicator snup
description: Client-side PvP jump reset timing HUD for Minecraft.
body:
# Jump Reset Indicator

Master your PvP timing.

Jump Reset Indicator is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod that helps you practice and improve jump resets in Minecraft PvP.
The mod detects knockback timing in real-time and displays a clean HUD showing how accurate your reset was:

🟩 PERFECT
🟦 GOOD
🟨 CLOSE

Designed for competitive PvP players who want better knockback control, cleaner combos, and more consistent movement.

## Features

* Real-time jump reset timing detection
* Modern animated HUD
* Fully client-side
* Movable HUD with config screen
* Supports multiple screen anchors
* Lightweight and optimized
* English & Russian localization

## How it works

A jump reset happens when you press jump at nearly the same moment you receive knockback from an enemy hit.
This converts horizontal knockback into vertical momentum, helping you stay closer to your opponent during fights.

The mod analyzes:

* incoming knockback velocity
* hurt timing
* jump input timing

and grades your reset accuracy instantly.

## Controls

* `P` — Open HUD configuration screen

## Requirements

* Minecraft 1.21.11
* Fabric Loader
* Fabric API

Train your timing. Win more fights.
